rows.rawChangeText: Zahir has a strong effect on skill hits, but has a large performance variance in engagements due to the difficulty of skill hits. Narayanastra(Q) 's activation speed is increased to increase hit rate, and Bhargavastra (R) 's range is increased to make it easier to combo with, but we’re also reducing his instant damage to balance it out. In the case of Throw Zahir, we’re buffing the overall Weapon type while reducing its mastery effects. Skill Amplification per Thrown Mastery Level 5.4% → 4.8%

rows.rawChangeText: Karla uses her mobility to catch a high amount of early kills, but her power decreases significantly in Late Game. To adjust for this, we're extending the range of her Piercing Chain(Q ) to increase her ability for range battles, but reducing the jump range of her Grappling Maneuver(E) to limit her mobility.
